title: Solar Mythos
description: This mod adds: A new biome, gray wood, hostiles mobs that spawn in the biome, armors, tools and structures
body:
This mod adds many things to your Minecraft world, introducing a new biome called Great Gray. In this new biome, you will find a new type of wood, new structures within the biome, hostile and peaceful entities, and a new set of armor and tools. 
**This mod is still in development, and I am still learning as I make it.**
